docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ,JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOPHIE YOUNG'S ALTERATIONS PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $68.00 COST. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 23280 ON 8-11-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
